name: Gourmet Grapes
recipeIngredient: 10 oz package almonds, pecans or walnuts
1 lb Seedless grapes (red or green), washed and dried
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 275°F.
2 Spread nuts on a baking sheet and bake until toasted. Almonds should be light golden brown in color. Pecans or walnuts should smell toasted, but not burned.
3 Chop toasted nuts coarsely in a food processor or by hand.
4 In an electric mixer bowl, combine cream cheese, Roquefort cheese, and heavy cream; beat until smooth.
5 Drop clean, dry grape into the cheese mixture and gently stir to coat them.
6 Roll coated grapes in toasted nuts.
7 Put on wax-paper-lined tray.
8 Chill until ready to serve.
